---
title: "Lab news"
---

---
title: "Lab news"
---

## XXXXX 2026

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](images/lab-news/ib.png)
:::

::: {.column width="70%"}

### We have a new home!

LaFIDA has just arrived at the [University of São Paulo](https://www5.usp.br/){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
